text:
the Master Beneficiary Summary File (MBSF) flags each Medicare beneficiary for the presence of one of 30 specific chronic conditions.

What does this file include? (variable highlights)
Two flags for each chronic condition:
First occurrence date
End of year indicator
Special considerations
The algorithms used to assign the flags are available from the CCW website.
Algorithms requiring a multiple-year look back period are completed without requiring the researcher to order multiple years of
